title: Anecdote in which 'Abdallah is cleared of suspected sympathies for Shi'ism
description: Anecdote in which 'Abdallah is cleared of suspected sympathies for Shi'ism. Recorded under the year 211 AH (826–827 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
